metadata.description: Claude Code skills by Robin van Baalen

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Micro-commit with conventional commit messages, with interactive and non-interactive (background) modes

plugins.name: make-issue
plugins.description: Create a new GitHub issue with template, type, and label selection

plugins.name: make-issue-comment
plugins.description: Post a structured investigation/fix comment on the active GitHub PR, update progress, and mark resolved when done. Proactively proposes itself when an investigation lands on a root cause and fix plan.

plugins.name: version-bump
plugins.description: Auto-suggest semver version bumps for changed plugins before pushing

plugins.name: ocr-document-processor
plugins.description: Extract text from images and scanned PDFs using OCR. Supports 100+ languages, table detection, structured output, and batch processing.

plugins.name: svg-precision
plugins.description: Deterministic SVG generation, validation, and rendering for icons, diagrams, charts, UI mockups, and technical drawings.

plugins.name: lottie-animator
plugins.description: Generate professional Lottie animations from static SVGs. Replaces After Effects for motion graphics.

plugins.name: react-query
plugins.description: TanStack Query v5 skill with three modes — code review, v4→v5 migration, and coding guidance for new v5 code. Grounded in the official v5 docs.

plugins.name: driverjs-guide
plugins.description: Driver.js product tours, onboarding flows, and element highlighting reference

plugins.name: cofounder
plugins.description: Critical-thinking business co-founder that enforces prioritization, challenges assumptions, and becomes smarter over time

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Delivery-focused project manager that enforces deadlines, tracks estimates, detects drift, and holds you accountable

plugins.name: use-agentvision
plugins.description: See and interact with the user's screen using Agent Vision — screenshots, element discovery, clicks, form filling, and visual QA

plugins.name: cpr
plugins.description: Commit, Push, and Release — one-command workflow with release-please integration

plugins.name: open-markdown
plugins.description: Offer to open markdown documents (plans, specs, design docs) in mdreader for comfortable reading

plugins.name: cloudflare-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy Astro sites to Cloudflare Workers with custom domains — setup, wrangler config, DNS, and deployment verification
